title: JRose Collections Kids Mega Lucky Bag 3 Pack Set – Unicorn, Football & Dinosaur Bags with 8 Surprises Each – Toys, Games, Crafts, Stickers & Activity Sheets – Party Bag Fillers & Fun Activities
features: 🎉 3 Pack Mega Lucky Bag Bundle – Includes Unicorn, Football & Dinosaur themes, each bursting with toys, stickers, puzzles, and crafts.
🧩 8 Surprises in Every Bag – From toys and stickers to activity sheets and puzzles, each bag delivers hours of fun and learning.
✏️ Free Activity Sheets – Each bag comes with themed puzzles, colouring pages, word searches, mazes, or matching games that keep kids learning while they play.
🧸 Perfect for Kids Ages 3+ – Great as party bag fillers, classroom rewards, travel activities, or surprise treats to keep little ones entertained.
✅ Safe & UKCA/CE Certified – All contents meet UK safety standards; not suitable for children under 3 years.
description: Product description Make playtime extra exciting with this 3 Pack Kids Mega Lucky Bag Set, featuring Unicorn, Football & Dinosaur themes. Each bag contains 8 fun surprises, including small toys, stickers, puzzles, and crafts – with every bag being different, kids love the variety. Every bag also includes a free themed activity sheet filled with fun challenges like mazes, word searches, colouring pages, tracing, and matching games. These activities keep kids entertained while boosting creativity and problem-solving. Perfect as party bag fillers, classroom prizes, travel activities, or everyday surprise treats, these Mega Lucky Bags provide endless fun and creativity. ⚠️ Safety Warning: Not suitable for children under 3 years due to small parts. Use under adult supervision. Safety Warning Not suitable for children under 3 years. Small parts – choking hazard. Use under adult supervision.
